name: cohortAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.cohorts.every(function(c){ return Number.isFinite(c.initialUsers) && Number.isFinite(c.avgRetention) && typeof c.cohort === 'string' && Array.isArray(c.retentionCurve); })

output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.cohorts.every(function(c){ return c.retentionCurve.every(function(p){ return Number.isFinite(p.period) && Number.isFinite(p.retained) && Number.isFinite(p.rate); }); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'analytics.cohortAnalysis'. Component sends {artifact:{data:{cohorts:[{name,initialUsers,retention}]}}}. Returns {cohorts:[{cohort,initialUsers,retentionCurve:[{period,retained,rate}],avgRetention}],bestCohort}. POISON: initialUsers/retention via finInt → FINITE; division guards initial===0 → rate 0 (no NaN). Non-array cohorts/retention degrades to a guidance message instead of throwing. Pinned by server/tests/analytics-lens-macros.test.js.
